documents.title: Adopt .NET 10 as the standard for all .NET projects
documents.summary: All .NET projects must target .NET 10 (net10.0). Projects referencing a lower version of .NET are not allowed.

documents.title: Unit testing
documents.summary: Use xUnit with the xunit.v3 NuGet package. Moq and Bogus.NET are approved for mocking and fake data. FluentAssertions is not allowed (commercial license).
